case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. PERKINS, SHERYL et al

docket_entries.description: C/C FOR TRIAL IN DEPT. 613, JDEARMAN, JUDGE; DSWANSON, CLERK NOT REPORTED. PLNTF APPR BY BTHOMPSON, ESQ. DEF SHERYL PERKINS APPR IN PRO PER.
